programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: A twerking, drinking, fighting staff threatens a once-thriving bar, leaving Ashley and Robert Gaddy's future at a crossroads.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon returns to Puerto Rico, where he used to live, to rescue a bar destroyed by Hurricane Maria and to help revive the rest of the community.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon brings in culinary expert Aaron McCargo Jr. and mixologist Mia Mastroianni to help a Florida couple's bar bounce back after years of failure under their son's management.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: An unappealing name is just the first of many problems plaguing Fatballs Sports Bar & Grill, where Jon must get a belligerent owner to accept responsibility.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: An industrious immigrant with a history of business success bites off more than he can chew when he buys Blue Water and takes a hands-off management approach.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: A daughter must grapple with the loss of her father as she struggles to preserve his legacy and save his bar, Cap'n Odie's Lounge.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon must help a struggling establishment figure out if it's a club, a restaurant, or a bar, in the highly competitive market of Las Vegas.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: A Las Vegas dive struggles under an owner who makes more enemies than friends, so it's up to Jon to step in and teach a lesson on civility.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon looks to rescue the bars of tomorrow by giving hospitality students at UNLV a one-week crash course on running a successful bar.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon heads back to Puerto Rico to help brother-and-sister bar owners who saw their business devastated by Hurricane Maria.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon must get an overly-emotional bar owner to stop wallowing and take action to save his bar.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: A pair of brothers can't see eye-to-eye on how to run their business, so one of them takes a run.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon heads to a tiny bar in China Grove, Texas, to help a couple on the verge of retirement stop enabling their belligerent daughter.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon must help two burnout rockers turned bar owners grow up in order to save their business, which is currently losing $100,000 a year.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Natalie, 22, says her boyfriend Justin, 25, has an anger problem, and she fears for her life and for their 10-month-old son. Both admit their child has witnessed turmoil. Does this young relationship have a future?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Ashley was sexually abused by her father from ages of 5 to 18, locked in a small camper, while giving birth to four of her father's children. In her first national interview since her father's arrest, the 22-year-old mom speaks about her horrible ordeal.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: The conversation heated when Dr. Phil gave self-professed bully Temica RoShawn a reality check about her aggressive behavior. Guests Ross & Lyndy say weeks of bullying culminated in their 15-yr-old son being sexually assaulted.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Amber was the envy of her friends, married, 2 kids, a beautiful home & 6-figure salary as a top-selling real estate agent. When she and her husband divorced, her life spiraled out of control. Dr.Phil examines Amber's fall from grace. Pt. 1

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Dr. Phil continues with Christina, Jim & daughter Tara. She says she's worried her daughter is in a toxic situation with dad Jim & his 22-year-old new wife who is 20 weeks pregnant. Meet the new wife & find out if Dr. Phil can help this chaotic triangle.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Melvin says he is torn between his wife of eight years, Rachel, and his girlfriend of two years, Chantelle, and he wants Dr. Phil to help decide whom he should choose. When the women meet face to face for the first time, does Dr. Phil help him choose?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Jon says he hates his selfish, untrustworthy dad, Jim, who works the holidays as Santa Claus! Then, pro-trainer Greg thinks he's on the show to talk health. Troy Dunn surprises him with his long-lost son! And 14-yr-old singing sensation Jackie Evancho!

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Harv and Lynne say their son, Mark, is an adolescent living in a 41-year-old man’s body. Mark is currently homeless and living in his beat-up car held together with bungee cords and glue. But Mark explains that he is “car camping” and not homeless.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Over 10 years ago, Suzy says she developed a "mysterious illness" that leaves her shaking, trembling, convulsing and having to force-feed herself more than 7,000 calories a day to stop her "attacks"! What could this mysterious illness possibly be?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Tammy and Paul wed for eight years until their marriage ended. After nine months apart the couple secretly remarried, unbeknownst to their families, who would not approve. Weeks after saying "I do" a second time, the two are having doubts of their own.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Dr. Phil continues with the fiancée of former football star Aaron Hernandez. Shayanna Jenkins- Hernandez speaks on Hernandez's suicide & responds to rumors about his sexuality & his alleged intimate relationship with a fellow inmate. Pt. 2

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Brittany says boyfriend Tim is evil, abusive & unfaithful. Tim admits that he can't control his rage & choked Brittany while holding their 6-month-old daughter & says he fears he'll hurt the baby next. Tim confesses to cheating with both men and women.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Jeffrey Dahmer Pt. 3. What creates a monster? Do chilling home videos of Jeffrey Dahmer as a little boy show an innocent child before he became evil? Or, were the signs already there? His parents reveal the red flags they say they missed.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Gina says her daughter, Alexis, 18, was "kidnapped" and "held hostage" by her survivalist boyfriend, David, 19, which Alexis and David deny. Mom Gina fears for Alexis's safety. David agrees he’s a survivalist who owns guns, but he's not dangerous. Part 1

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Granny decides to take her share of the Clampett millions and move back home.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jed and Granny decide to donate the burden of their millions to some college students and move back home.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: When Crowfoot Indians come to Beverly Hills to discuss a boundary dispute at the Clampett oil field, Granny prepares for war.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: After reading the Society page, Granny decides the best way to get Elly a husband is to throw her a coming out party, complete with possum burgers and gopher gravy. Mrs. Drysdale, hoping to forever humiliate them, is all too happy to help.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: The Clampketts come across Narda and Yerko, two gypsies, who decide to run a scam on the unsuspecting clan. Involving both a marriage prophecy and a curse, the crooks see the families' naivety to their advantage.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: The Clampetts are visited by a real king, Alexander, so Granny and Mrs. Drysdale start matchmaking. The broke royal needs a wealthy bride and courts Ellie. Drysdale niece Doreen is tricked by a costumed Jethro and ends up unimpressed.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: The Clampetts acquire a hippopotamus when an advertising scheme originated by banker Drysdale backfires.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Banker Milburn 'Drysdale's precocious 11-year-old nephew swindles the hillbillies of all the valuable art objects in their mansion.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jed Clampett has inherited a castle in the English countryside. Jethro insists that everyone, except Granny, wear the royal raiment's of Elizabeth (the First, of course).

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: The Clampetts head to England to visit the castle Jed inherited. Misunderstandings abound, from Jethro mistaking San Francisco for London, to the impounding of Granny's medical supplies, to the real intentions of the elderly chemist.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: The Clampetts finally make it to their new castle and try to adjust to the English way of castle life, at the least the way Jethro thinks it is, based on his understanding of English myths and legends.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: When Jethro gets his draft notice, Jed decides he should pay what it costs the Army to train inductees. When Mr. Drysdale hears this, he starts figuring how he can get Jethro out on a Section 8.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jethro reports to the induction center after getting his draft notice. The Army isn't quite sure what to make of Jethro.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Since Granny can't plant crops in their yard, Jed thinks the solution is to buy her a plot a land somewhere else. He figures a place called Happy Acres is the best spot to buy land, not realizing it's a cemetery.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jethro thinks he wants to be a naval frogman, but Granny is concerned her tonic has transformed him. Mr. Drysdale, concerned about finances, has Miss Jane distract Jethro with comics, causing him to want to fly to the moon.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jethro heads down to the Reserves HQ while wearing an ancestor's Confederate Army uniform. The Sergeant thinks he's an actor there to participate in a Civil War reenactment. Jethro runs home to tell Granny the Civil War is still on.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Col. Blake asks the actor playing Gen. Grant to play along with Granny so that the Civil War movie can continue. Meanwhile, Jethro uses his 6th grade education to take the written test to enter the Reserves.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jethro believes his moment for Hollywood stardom has arrived. Casting for Bachelor Sheriff Knows Best is occurring, and Jethro mistakenly thinks he has been chosen.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Granny competes against Mrs. Drysdale as artists and tells Jed about her uncle, the barn painter. Jed and Jethro go to an upscale gallery to buy a painting, but are mistaken for gardeners. Bessie the chimp dabbles with a paintbrush.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: After Ellie seems to be no longer interested in Dash Riprock Granny decides it's time to do a little matchmaking. She thinks the handsome actor would be perfect for Miss Jane.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Mr. Drysdale talks the Clampetts into hiring a housekeeper. Unfortunately, the housekeeper that is hired is uninterested in doing housework.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Granny's old friend, the widow Adaline Ashley, comes to Beverly Hills, and Granny sets to playing matchmaker for her and Jed. Mrs. Drysdale and her snooty friends are misled to believe Adaline is a socialite jet-setter.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jethro decides to turn his favorite thing, eating, into a job by getting the family involved in buying a diner. The family's choice of offerings lead to a lack of customers, so Mr. Drysdale tries to fix things.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jethro, worried that his diner the Hungry Gizzard has no customers, has a wonderful idea. He busts in on Mr. Drysdale trying to impress the wealthy Vanderpools, announcing the restaurant is going topless. Confusion ensues.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Granny wants to leave sunny California because she misses winter, sending Mr. Drysdale into a panic. The banker enlists Miss Jane in an elaborate scheme to convince the Clampetts that a blizzard has occurred.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: The last televised wrestling match was such a success that the promoter wants a rematch. Granny isn't interested until Rebecca's parents visit.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Granny is worried about Miss Jane's spinsterhood and convinces Jethro to ask her to marry him. Granny assures him that she will decline the proposal, but Hathaway accepts, leading to panic in the Clampett household.

programme.title: Beverly Hills, 90210
programme.desc: (S01E008) The Walsh parents examine their relationship while Brenda and Brandon examine theirs, as they get involved in a UCLA study on twins.

programme.title: Beverly Hills, 90210
programme.desc: (S01E009) Sympathy and responsibility are at odds when Brenda volunteers for a teen crisis hotline.

programme.title: Beverly Hills, 90210
programme.desc: (S01E010) The chemistry between Brenda and Dylan starts to heat up when Brenda accidentally catches him in the shower, then comforts him after he fights with his father.

programme.title: Beverly Hills, 90210
programme.desc: (S01E011) Both Walsh twins face the temptation to drink alcohol when their peers are doing it all around them.

programme.title: Beverly Hills, 90210
programme.desc: (S01E012) Brandon gets an unexpected taste of fatherhood when he asks his classmate Melissa for a date-then has to baby-sit her infant son while she has a college interview.

programme.title: Beverly Hills, 90210
programme.desc: (S01E013) Pillow talk threatens to destroy Brenda's sleep-over as all the girls share their deepest secrets, with unexpected results.

programme.title: Beverly Hills, 90210
programme.desc: (S01E014) The Walsh's agree to let their maid's niece, Carla, use their address to enroll at West Beverly.

programme.title: Beverly Hills, 90210
programme.desc: (S01E015) A weekend in Palm Springs goes awry when David invites Steve, Kelly and Donna to join him at his grandparents' house while they're away on a cruise-but he gets the dates confused, and they're still there.

programme.title: Beverly Hills, 90210
programme.desc: (S01E016) Brandon is "discovered" when he's out roller-blading, landing a role as an emergency extra on a big TV show.

programme.title: Beverly Hills, 90210
programme.desc: (S01E017) Brenda's had it with home life and West Beverly and decides to leave both for the real world.

programme.title: Beverly Hills, 90210
programme.desc: (S01E018) The Walsh twins and all their friends are panicked by the upcoming SATs, but then everything gets put in perspective when Brenda finds a lump in her breast and faces a test no one can prepare for.

programme.title: Beverly Hills, 90210
programme.desc: (S01E019) Brandon interviews a classmate, Roger, who's an outstanding athlete and student--and haunted by the overbearing success of his father.

programme.title: Beverly Hills, 90210
programme.desc: (S01E020) Baseball fever strikes when Brandon is asked to coach a little league team after his dad gets injured.

programme.title: Beverly Hills, 90210
programme.desc: (S01E021) The drama and the stakes rise as the West Beverly High crew gets ready for their Spring Dance.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español)
programme.desc: Danny y Baez se unen a una fuerza de tarea antidrogas para rastrear a un proveedor de drogas. Baez entra en contacto con las sustancias y pronto lucha por su vida debido a una sobredosis accidental.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español)
programme.desc: Erin está conflictuada cuando Jamie y Eddie le piden que elimine los cargos antiguos contra Parker Mack (Spencer House), un hombre que valientemente rescató a una mujer de una situación de rehenes.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: La UAC viaja a Los Ángeles en búsqueda de un sospechoso que secuestra niñeras y niños que cuidan el mismo día cada año.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: La UAC se dirige a Detroit cuando las parejas son asesinadas y metidas en sus coches. Mientras tanto, el esposo de Blake se lo cuenta todo.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Hotch recibe una llamada telefónica de su hermano Sean, de quien está separado y reside en Nueva York, de quien no ha escuchado nada durante cuatro años.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Tras el caso de Éxtasis en Nueva York, el imitador pirateó el sistema informático de García, en el que publica fotografías de cada uno de los miembros del equipo en Nueva York y su tarjeta de visita “Zugzwang”.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: El equipo de NCIS investiga cuando un honrado Marine veterano encuentra a su muerte cayendo al vacío en un hotel.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: McGee lucha para saber qué ocurrió luego de que su hermana aparezca ensangrentada y confundida frente a su puerta.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: El equipo de NCIS disgustado, reúne fuerzas junto al FBI luego de identificar que los restos de un hombre hallado en una base Marine coinciden con los de un asesino serial que el Bureau viene buscando hace 12 años.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Cuando un altamente clasificado vehículo robotizado llamado Otto causa la muerte de una teniente de la Marina, Gibbs y el equipo analizan si se trata de un suicidio o un homicidio.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español)
programme.desc: Erin está conflictuada cuando Jamie y Eddie le piden que elimine los cargos antiguos contra Parker Mack (Spencer House), un hombre que valientemente rescató a una mujer de una situación de rehenes.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español)
programme.desc: Una periodista desaparece mientras investiga un reportaje sobre un hombre inocente condenado por asesinato, Danny y Baez esperan que reexaminar el caso original ayude a encontrarla.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español)
programme.desc: Después de que Anthony es baleado mientras entrevista a un testigo para un juicio por asesinato, Erin pide a su archienemigo Danny que lo ayude a encontrar al culpable.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español)
programme.desc: Cuando Henry es el testigo clave en el caso de Danny y Baez, su constante intromisión molesta tanto a Danny que termina llevándolos a una pista valiosa.

programme.title: Caso Cerrado

programme.title: Caso Cerrado

programme.title: Caso Cerrado

programme.title: Dos amantes y un oso

programme.title: Telaraña

programme.title: Una Vida Sin Terminar

programme.title: 40 días y 40 noches

programme.title: Juego de ladrones

programme.desc: Chaos reigns on the wide open plains as a host of stars, including Burt Lancaster and Lee Remick, have their eyes set on a shipment of whiskey and let loose in this wild comedy that spoofs nearly every convention of movie westerns.

programme.title: Two For The Seesaw
programme.desc: Robert Wise directs Robert Mitchum and Shirley MacLaine in this spicy and poignant love story about a free-spirited Greenwich Village girl who hooks up with a brooding Nebraska lawyer.

programme.desc: The Marx Brothers are employed at a hotel in post-war Casablanca, where a ring of Nazis are trying to recover a cache of stolen treasure.

programme.title: Taxi

programme.title: Taxi

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Bobby and Tony’s friendship is on the line when they become embroiled in a hilarious love triangle and attempt to outdo each other in vying for the affection of a beautiful young lady.

programme.title: Maude
programme.desc: The Arthur-Vivian love affair comes apart at the seams when Vivian begins to resent Arthur's constant eulogizing of his late wife in every conversation. Maude thinks Arthur's romantic memories of his late wife are perfectly natural.

programme.title: Maude
programme.desc: Maude's flawed liberalism bubbles to the surface once more as she decides it would be a lovely gesture to invite a black child from the ghetto to live with them for two weeks.

programme.title: Maude
programme.desc: Should the contents of a man's wallet be 'off-limits' to his wife? Walter definitely thinks so, and when his wallet accidentally falls out of a drawer, Maude can't resist the temptation to peek at its contents.

programme.title: Maude
programme.desc: The last thing in the world Maude Findlay wants for a birthday gift is a surprise party where the men talk only to the men and the women are left together in another corner -- but that's exactly what Walter gives her.

programme.title: Maude
programme.desc: In a frantic effort to get Arthur and Vivian married, Maude plans a weekend wedding in wintry New England but the wedding party becomes snowbound in a Vermont train station.

programme.title: Maude

programme.desc: To improve the camp's inspection rating, Klink transfers in a stern German sergeant who quickly makes life miserable for staff and prisoners alike with his overly strict and unwavering adherence to all regulations. All want him gone.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Bumbling British Colonel Crittendon again disrupts Hogan's plans to get out an Allied officer who is also named Crittendon.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Después de inspeccionar el daño de una tormenta en un hogar en Tampa, un asesor de seguros simplemente desapareció. Treinta horas después, su cuerpo apareció en un río cercano. Pero el asesino había sido descuidado.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Después de dispararle a sus víctimas en la cabeza, el asesino limpió la escena, colocó la evidencia incriminatoria en una bolsa de plástico y la arrojó al río.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: El mal pie
programme.desc: La policía estaba desconcertada por una huella oscura encontrada en la escena del crimen donde un hombre había sido asesinado y dos adolescentes resultaron gravemente heridas.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Cuando se encuentra a Joann Katrinak muerta en un campo de maíz con su hijo pequeño, el sospechoso más obvio es el esposo y padre de las víctimas.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: El infiel
programme.desc: Walter Notheis, Jr. era mejor conocido al público Americano como el entretenedor, Walter Scott, vocalista principal de la banda, Bob Kuban and the In-Men. Walter no sabía que la canción sería una premonición de los eventos que llevarían a su muerte.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Cuando se encuentra muerta a Leann Fletcher, los investigadores usan análisis de salpicaduras de sangre y computación forense para encontrar el motivo de su asesinato: su esposo, estaba teniendo una aventura con la jueza Susan Chrzanowski.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Cuando se reporta la desaparición de una estudiante universitaria, la policía cree que su investigación será como muchas otras. Pero cuando descubren salpicaduras de sangre en la habitación de su novio, saben que este caso será diferente.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1990, el cuerpo de Shirley Andronowich fue encontrado mutilado. Los testigos le dijeron a la policía que tuvo una pelea con su esposo la noche anterior, pero la evidencia forense demostró que él no tuvo nada que ver con su muerte.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Pistas de elefante

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Atormentada por la desaparición de su madre, una joven emprendió su propia investigación.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos

programme.title: Deal or No Deal

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Manny’s on a mission this year—it’s bye bye cute and hello hot. That means midriff baring tops, low-riders and thongs.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Paige organizes a final hurrah at the beach and even convinces her older brother, Dylan, to act as chauffeur. Spinner’s a bit put-off by Dylan’s openly gay attitude, but his presence is an eye-opener for Marco.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Spinner just can’t deal with the fact that Marco’s gay so he tries to cut Marco out of life. But when the guys all go to see Dylan’s hockey game, Jimmy makes sure that Marco comes along.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Things haven’t been going very well for Sean lately. Emma’s busy dealing with Snake’s illness and a brand new baby brother and Tracker’s busy leading the exciting life a normal 20-something.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Things are pretty hot between Craig and Ashley, but he’s disappointed that she keeps pulling back from going all the way.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Life’s getting more and more stressful for Ellie—her dad just left on another Peacekeeping Mission, her mom’s drinking again and she’s interning for Caitlin Ryan’s tv show. As things get more and more hectic, Ellie has no one to help her cope.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Emma decides it’s time to move on in matters of the heart when she realizes she has feelings for new kid Chris.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Terri’s in heaven-- not only does she have a terrific boyfriend, the wonderful romantic Rick, she also has the lead in the school play!

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The holiday season is fast approaching and the Jeremiah house is abuzz - Angela has her upcoming Christmas skating pageant, Craig and Ashley are a serious item, and Joey and Sydney are getting serious.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The holiday season is fast approaching and the Jeremiah house is abuzz - Angela has her upcoming Christmas skating pageant, Craig and Ashley are a serious item, and Joey and Sydney are getting serious.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Things are back on track for Emma now that she’s officially over Sean. Chris has even asked her out! But when she hears rumours that Sean’s part of a gang stealing things from Degrassi (including Mr. Simpson’s laptop)

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: It’s a big gymnastics meet at Degrassi, and Manny’s going to lead the team to gold! But when she starts to feel sick, she fears that her queasy stomach might be more than the flu or even a bad nerves.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Manny’s tempted by the romantic family scenario Craig paints and begins to think she and Craig really could keep this baby. Even Ashley shares the news with the entire cafeteria.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Five kids from different worlds are stuck in a room -- on a Saturday! When Raditch introduces Saturday detention, Sean, Ellie, Hazel, Jimmy and Toby are the first inductees.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Just when Terri thought she’d gotten over her ex boyfriend, Rick, he makes a concerted effort to win back her affections. She and her friends are wary – after all, leopards can’t change their spots.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Craig’s determined that he and the guys will be the “Last Band Standing” at Degrassi’s battle of the bands and win a spot on the show. So he sets the guys a fierce practice schedule and starts to write a killer new song.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The year-end Junior Formal is fast approaching, and Marco is in charge, except when it comes to a date. Problem is, Marco’s too nervous to ask Dylan out at all, let alone ask him to the prom.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: A stressed-out Paige and Spinner decide they need a break and skip school for the day. Ashley, meanwhile, is in the doldrums, too “sick” to go to school. So when Ashley calls Paige to get her homework, Paige decides Ash needs to join them in a little fun.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Once again, as things finally start to come together for Sean, the other shoe drops - his brother and guardian, Tracker, has found a new job in Alberta. Sean thinks his life is over until he finds out that he can legally live on his own.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The year end semi-formal is only hours away and Marco has transformed the gym into an idealized Bombay. It promises to be an amazing event, except Marco’s theme is causing tension between him and Ellie. Ellie finds the whole idea racist

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: It’s the end of summer and Paige receives some unexpected news - her rape case has finally made it to trial and she’s the star witness. Finally…justice!

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Shocked by the outcome of the trial, Paige holes up in her room. But when Marco is able to coax her out to party at Dylan’s dorm with the gang, things go from bad to worse when she and Spinner have a blow-out fight.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Marco’s a shoo-in for Student Council President until Alex enters the race. While at first Alex seems an unlikely candidate, her strong opinions and anti-establishment platform take hold with the students and Marco realizes she might well win.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Feeling ignored on Student Council, Emma finds a way to get her voice heard when she takes up a new cause - ganging up with the cool kids to keep Terri’s abusive ex-boyfriend Rick, out of Degrassi.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Things are going great for Sean and Ellie, Degrassi’s most unlikely couple—so well that Sean asks Ellie to move in. Despite their closeness, Ellie hesitates and Sean doesn’t understand why.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: In her quest to repay Spinner for damage to his car, Alpha Paige has gone all beta. Suddenly, Spin’s using his new-found powers to zap whatever self-confidence Paige has left.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Rick decides to get back at his bullies, hitting them right where it hurts – their cars. But when Jimmy becomes a member of the “Whack Your Brain” team, the two form a truce.

programme.title: Journeys From the Centre of the Earth
programme.desc: Dr Iain Stewart looks at how ancient civilisations learned to exploit the water around them, from the flooding of our Stone Age ancestors' hunting grounds to the fall of the Roman Empire.

programme.title: Journeys From the Centre of the Earth
programme.desc: Dr Iain Stewart looks at how salt has played a crucial role in the history of the Mediterranean, from the ice ages to the preservation of food and dead bodies in ancient Egypt.

programme.title: How to Build a Dinosaur
programme.desc: Dinosaurs died out 65 million years ago and we have hardly ever found a complete skeleton. So how do we turn a pile of broken bones into a dinosaur exhibit? Dr Alice Roberts finds out how the experts put skeletons back together.

programme.title: Science of Walking With Beasts
programme.desc: This episode explains how the 120-million-year reign of the dinosaurs ended when mammals became the fastest and fiercest creatures on the planet.

programme.title: Science of Walking With Beasts
programme.desc: A look at the science that has proved Darwin's idea that intelligent, sophisticated humans have an ancestral connection with the ape.

programme.title: Walking with Monsters: Life Before Dinosaurs
programme.desc: The evolution of the predators who lived 550 million years ago, and how the first amphibians migrated from sea to land.

programme.title: Walking with Monsters: Life Before Dinosaurs
programme.desc: Three hundred million years ago, the forests were ruled by insects. This was a world in which giant dragonflies battled with two-foot-wide spiders.

programme.title: Walking with Monsters: Life Before Dinosaurs
programme.desc: On the supercontinent Pangea, early therapsids, creatures more similar to mammals than reptiles, fight for survival alongside other animals. In the carboniferous swamps, insects and arthropods take over and grow into giants.

programme.title: Lost Worlds: Vanished Lives
programme.desc: David travels the world to unravel some of the wonders and puzzles of palaeontology. But how do you find the world's oldest and rarest reptile?

programme.title: Lost Worlds: Vanished Lives
programme.desc: Could pterodactyls fly? And why did trilobites have such good eyes? David Attenborough investigates the secret lives of animals from the past, as told in the fossil record.

programme.title: Lost Worlds: Vanished Lives
programme.desc: David Attenborough uncovers dinosaur bones in the Sahara desert and visits the biggest, most spectacular dinosaur displays in the world.

programme.title: Lost Worlds: Vanished Lives
programme.desc: David Attenborough uncovers bizarre creatures of the earliest seas, tiny horses the size of spaniels and an animal that's half bird and half reptile - the rarest of them all.

programme.title: The Truth About Killer Dinosaurs
programme.desc: Bird expert Bill Oddie helps construct amazing, life-sized, bio-mechanical replicas as he presents an imaginary battle between a tyrannosaurus rex and a triceratops.

programme.title: The Truth About Killer Dinosaurs
programme.desc: Here, Bill Oddie asks whether the Velociraptor was really the monstrous predator of popular legend.

programme.title: Prehistoric Autopsy
programme.desc: Anatomist Professor Alice Roberts and biologist Dr George McGavin go on an extraordinary evolutionary journey to meet our ancient ancestors. They start with our closest prehistoric relative, a Neanderthal.

programme.title: Prehistoric Autopsy
programme.desc: The team go back 1.5 million years to meet one of the earliest humans, Homo erectus. They walked the earth far longer than any other human species and were the first ancestors to look a lot like we do today.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: The Doctor arrives on an alien world and is accused of being 'the evil one'.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: The Doctor tries to win the trust of the savage Sevateem tribe.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: The Doctor discovers the terrible truth about Xoanon and realizes that he is to blame.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: The insane computer Xoanon refuses the Doctor's help and prepares to destroy the planet.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: The TARDIS takes the Doctor and Leela to a huge, mobile sand mine on an alien world.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: The Doctor and Leela are blamed for the murder of one of the sandminer's crew.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: Taren Capel is using the robots to carry out the murders.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: As the robots close in, the Doctor and Leela join forces with the crew to fight back.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: Content shows attitudes of its time and may be offensive to some viewers. The team land in Victorian London.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: Content shows attitudes of its time and may be offensive to some viewers. The team hide with Prof Litefoot.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who

programme.desc: A Yorkshire terrier barks too much; a once-shy German shepherd becomes aggressive; a shepherd mix has a whining problem.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Cesar tries to help an aggressive Shiba Inu from Japan and meets a wire fox terrier who has a fixation with a riding lawn-mower.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Cesar revisits some of his toughest cases and sees how being on the show changed not only the dogs, but the lives of the owners.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: An Alaskan malamute exhibits aggressive tendencies; Cesar helps a professional dog walker with her clients.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A German shepherd and Welsh corgi mix has dog aggression; a blind Lab chases his tail when he is around food.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: An aggressive bulldog; a beagle/terrier mix with a fear of trash cans; a Lab mix who starts to exhibit anxiety outside.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A pit bull is aggressive toward strangers; a Rottweiler/Shar-Pei mix must get his aggression under control or be euthanized.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A ridgeback/boxer mix's high energy develops into severe aggression; a couple's whippets bark and lunge at any dog that comes inside the boutique.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: TV personality Ed McMahon has an aggressive wheaten terrier; a beagle does not leave the house; an Australian shepherd is so territorial no one has visited his home in years.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A widow's retriever mix and two fox terriers do not get along; a Shar-Pei/Doberman mix drools excessively on car rides; Cesar revisits a Rottweiler mix.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: After a 45-day stint in Iraq and two hurricanes, an explosive-sniffing ATF Labrador retriever begins exhibiting severe symptoms of terror.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Cesar Millan helps an overly aggressive German shepherd and a timid rat terrier.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Cesar tries to help bring peace to Jennifer Lee Pryor's home, where fights have been breaking out among foster dogs and her own four dogs; an aggressive beagle.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A Yorkshire terrier who became aggressive after going blind; a spoiled Pekingese/miniature poodle mix; a Rottweiler with a dangerous obsession with the horses on the ranch where she lives.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: After releasing the second part of his autobiography, Dog and his family traveled across America, and this very special episode offers an intimate portrait of both the public and private moments of that journey.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog is back in Colorado chasing a young man with a taste for trouble. He's fled to Texas but with his family's house on the line Dog is willing to try a risky strategy.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Today's hunt takes Dog far from the glittering hotels of Waikiki to the parts of Hawaii tourist rarely see, Oahu's ramshackle tent cities. The team searches for a woman who has lost almost everything, her home, her family and her spirit.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog's good friend and fellow bondsman Chris is running out of time. He has only days to find his fugitive or risk losing his business. In his hunt, Dog confronts duplicitous tipsters, vicious attack dogs, and hostile neighbors.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: The bounty-hunter adventures of Duane "Dog" Chapman and his Posse are chronicled in this one hour "Best Of" special, featuring superlative memorable moments from the previous seven seasons.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog launches a high stake hunt through the desolate and dangerous mountain landscape of western Colorado in pursuit of a gun-loving survivalist with a million dollar bond on his head. Will Dog's plan of using brains over brawn work?

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Once in Montrose, Dog discovers that the million dollar fugitive is not the young bondsman's only problem. Dog and Beth make it their mission to both clean up the mess and teach him the fundamentals of bondsmanship.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog is committed to saving his new friend's bail bonding business, and now must race against time to bring a rogues' gallery to justice in the High Sierra mountain town of Montrose, CO.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: With four outlaws still on the lam, Dog sets out to bring 'em in. As day turns into night and with the darkness and the danger mounting, an undaunted Dog and team plan late night hits on the riskiest of locations--their targets' homes.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: With a long record of violence and abuse and weighing in at over 200lbs, Dog's target for the day does not sound like a gentle giant. When the trail grows cold, Dog turns up the heat on the fugitive's brother and sister.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Friend of the family, Kili, is joining the team to help track down a runner on the Hawaiian island of Maui. This is not the only thing on their schedule, because after the hunt, Kili has to hurry off to his college graduation ceremony!

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Leland has to attend a Lamaze class before he can join the hunt--another Chapman is on the way! But when Dog starts to go after this accused jewelry thief without his fastest son, he learns that this fugitive puts the "R" in runner.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: When Dog discovers today's prey is a notorious ladies man, he knows just how to lure him in. The trap includes a suggestive phone call, a motel rendezvous, and a crew of bounty hunters waiting in the next room ready to break up the party!

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Fallon gets a letter from Steven and it turns out he's on an oil rig in the Java Sea, Indonesia. Adam mixes the toxic compound in the paint for Jeff's new office. Fallon hires Kirby as a nanny for little Blake.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Jeff starts to become dizzy and affected by the toxic paint Adam used in his office. Joseph tells Kirby to stay away from Jeff. Krystle goes to Acapulco to find out what really happened with the so-called divorce from Mark.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: The Carrington family is informed that Steven's oil rig exploded. Blake goes to look for him, with an uninvited Alexis. Sammy Jo's father returns to Denver to collect Sammy Jo's share of Steven's inheritance, but Krystle throws him out.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Alexis and Blake continue the search for Steven in Indonesia but find evidence that Steven might be dead. Blake refuses to believe it, and hires a psychic, Jason Denner, to help. Jeff gets really ill from the paint in his office. Adam rapes Kirby.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Back in Denver, Blake continues his frantic search for Steven with the help of psychic Jason Dehner. Blake refuses to believe his son is dead, and Krystle is worried about his erratic behavior. Fallon mends fences with stepmother, Krystle.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: An obviously ill Jeff continues to function in a confused state. Sammy Jo announces she's headed for New York to make it big as a model and no longer wants to keep her son, Danny. Blake offers the girl $100,000 to be a mother to the child.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Jeff's temper continues to grow more volatile. Adam attempts to implicate Jeff in the Cecil Colby/Logan Rhinewood scandal. After learning that Blake and Krystle intend to adopt Steven's son Danny, Alexis demands custody of her grandson.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Although Blake begs her to postpone taking action until Jeff's violent behavior can be explained. Fallon flies to Haiti to obtain a divorce; Mark shows up unexpectedly at her hotel. Alexis tells Adam she cannot allow Jeff to be poisoned.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Alexis is concerned the doctors will learn the truth behind Jeff's illness, but Adam tries to cover by ordering his office remodeled and the lethal paint compound removed. Mark and Fallon get closer in Haiti.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Krystle suspects Alexis knows the reason for Jeff's illness; Blake tries to prevent Alexis' proposed merger; Jeff is released from the hospital and Kirby reveals her feelings for him.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: As Blake is departing for Singapore to identify his son, Alexis intercepts him at the airport to assure him she will not be stopped from merging their respective companies.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Blake persaudes Steven to return to Denver for his son's sake; the rest of the Carringtons are emotional, learning that Steven's alive and returning home; once home, Steven reunites with Alexis.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Upon hearing that Kirby has married Jeff, Joseph tells his daughter she has ruined her life. Blake suggests to Alexis they call a truce to their battle over Steven; Alexis offers Steven a share in Colbyco.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: As the Board of Directors gathers to vote on the Denver-Carrington/Colbyco merger, Alexis pointedly tells the group that a nay vote will be met with immediate dismissal. The approval of the motion sends Blake into a fury.

programme.title: Mork & Mindy

programme.title: Mork & Mindy

programme.title: Mork & Mindy
programme.desc: Mork turns the apartment he shares with Mindy into a hilarious hideaway for a young chimpanzee that he kidnaps from the Boulder zoo in the mistaken belief that the animal's mother has been abducted.

programme.title: Mork & Mindy
programme.desc: Mork sends the face-lifting business into orbit when he hilariously rushes to a plastic surgeon to shoot the works after Mindy gives Mork the idea that everyone could use a little improverrent on Mork & Mindy.

programme.title: Mork & Mindy
programme.desc: Naive Mork puts on his own out-of-this-world telethon to help Mindy raise charity funds, but is such a funny failure at fund-raising that he turns to his own outrageous brand of panhandling to come up with the needed money.

programme.title: Mork & Mindy
programme.desc: Mindy, hired by a small TV station, has a disastrous on-camera debut until Mork leaps to a riotous rescue with his far-out Orkan presentation of the evening news.

programme.title: Mork & Mindy
programme.desc: Mork faces almost unbeatable competition for his job as official Earth observer from his Orkan hero, the suave and charming Xerko, who beams to Earth to challenge Mork to an outrageous contest for the right to send reports back to Ork.

programme.title: Mork & Mindy
programme.desc: Mork, who has never heard of Robin Williams and scoffs at the idea of resembling him, gets crushed by mobs of fans who think he is the popular comedian, then has a hilarious nose-to-nose encounter with the famous star.

programme.title: Mork & Mindy
programme.desc: Mork, lonely in Mindy's absence, sets the stage for amazing comical confusion when he gets the visiting Orkan Elder to clone multiple Mindys which he continues to do until he gets it right.

programme.title: Mork & Mindy
programme.desc: Mindy is convinced that she has unleashed the swingingest single ever after she persuades Mork that it would inprove their relationship if each began dating new people and he turns into the hilarious new king of Boulder's social scene.

programme.title: Mork & Mindy
programme.desc: When Mindy eats one of Mork's gourmet delights, she turns into a wacky Orkan herself, sending her family reunion into a rollicking tizzy and treating pompous old Uncle Dave (special guest star Jonathan Winters) to a bizarre evening he won't forget.

programme.title: Mork & Mindy
programme.desc: The joyous visit by everyone's favorite, Grandma Cora, turns to gloom when she gets mugged in the park, but Mork turns the dastardly deed into a hilarious caper when he and Grandma join forces to even the score.

programme.desc: El Noruego no cumple con sus responsabilidades con la casa por lo que es expulsado por Gaspar. El Noruego se embarca en una travesía sin saber que lleva un ángel guardián. Segunda parte.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Gaspar pierde su trabajo y se desconecta del mundo mientras que el Abuelo y el Noruego empiezan un negocio.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego cansado de que todo mundo lo busque solo por su dinero busca a Pitipú para que le ayude a idear un plan, mientras que Peluzín se embarca en el mundo de la robótica.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo y el Noruego buscan nuevos horizontes a través de la creación de una fundación, mientras Peluzín cae en la cuenta de su soledad y sale a buscar amigos.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Un incidente hace que Irma revalore su vida y desaparezca. Mientras el Abuelo y el Noruego tratan de encontrarla, Gaspar y Jonathan tratan de encontrarle su lugar a Olaf en la familia.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El calentamiento global trae consigo una mueva amenaza para la ciudad, mientras que Irma y Peluzín emprenden en un nuevo negocio, reclutando a varios amigos.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Viendo la tele en la sala de su casa de repente el Abuelo y el Noruego son golpeados con una nueva idea para lucrar en un popular programa de TV. Mientras tanto Peluzín se aventaja de un descuido de Gaspar.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: La compañía donde trabaja Gaspar atraviesa un recorte de personal pero el es de los pocos afortunados que se salva y es mandado a una capacitación a Estados Unidos, mientras que Peluzín toma el papel de Gaspar en México.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: En este episodio La familia del barrio muestra una divertida parodia a las Sitcoms mas populares, desde la óptica del prototipo de familia mexicana disfuncional.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Gaspar y el Abuelo se topan con una familia muy peculiar, situación que el Abuelo busca aprovechar, mientras que Peluzín y Pitipu buscan curar a Don Sebas de una extraña adicción.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Irma organiza un club de peleas clandestinas, mientras que Pitipú decepcionado de sus conocimientos Bíblicos, decide embarcarse en el camino del mal.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: LFDB decide hacerle una intervención al Abuelo porque está mas hostil que nunca y quieren que busque tratamiento médico, mientras que Peluzín y Jonathan ayudan a Pitipú a conseguir su nacionalidad.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Peluzín adquiere una nueva mascota que revolucionará el vecindario. En tanto el Noruego y Gaspar intentan ayudar a el Lentejas a superar sus extrañas inclinaciones sexuales.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Los del Barrio llegan a su edificio y se dan cuenta que está rodeado por un gran muro que les impide la entrada.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Jonathan y Gaspar buscan darle una lección al Abuelo en en Día del Padre, mientras que el Noruego se siente que no es valorado por Olaf y junto con Peluzín deciden tomar cartas en el asunto.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo entra en el mundo de la actuación y Peluzín es arrestado.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego aprende inglés y se prepara para vivir el sueño americano. En tanto, el Abuelo llega a un reencuentro con sus ex-compañeros de colegio y descubre una verdad sepultada por el tiempo.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo se involucra sentimentalmente con la nueva roommate del Noruego, la cual esconde un oscuro secreto, mientras tanto Peluzín y Jony buscan lanzar a Olaf al estrellato.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Los Lambreton son los encargados de organizar la fiesta navideña de este año en su casa, mientras que Don Sebas extraña a su país natal y piensa en regresar.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Pitipú recibe una visita de su pasado el cual lleva muchos años tratando de dejar atrás, mientras que el Noruego se embarca en una búsqueda para conseguirle una madre a Olaf.

programme.title: Super Wings

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Jett delivers a sticker book to a boy named Victor in Mexico whose Mom has a plan: if Victor earns 10 stickers by doing 10 chores, she'll give him a big reward.

programme.title: La venganza de los ex: Caribe

programme.title: La venganza de los ex: Caribe
programme.desc: Lua, la ex de Gabriel, llega a la playa. Gab y Angietta queman a JV, pero a Lua no le importa y los dos se enrollan mucho en una cita. Camila y Ortega rompen. La tablet les convoca a un Luau donde llega Julio, el ex novio de Mari A.

programme.title: La venganza de los ex: Caribe
programme.desc: Al ver llegar a su ex, Mari A se preocupa por Ortega. Mario y Apolo se pelean por Let. Ortega se derrumba ante la llegada de su ex. La tablet regala la suite a Camila. Let recoge a Gabriel y Ortega y Mariana se ponen al día bajo el edredón.

programme.title: Catfish Colombia
programme.desc: Hace tres años que Henry mantiene una relación en línea con Alejandra. A lo largo de los años ambos han estado hablando en línea y Henry cree que ella es la mujer de sus sueños.

programme.title: La venganza de los ex
programme.desc: Llega un nuevo ex dispuesto a buscar venganza. La pool party se descontrola y surge el amor entre Renata y Sargento, lo que pone muy celosa a Norma. Montse y Spencer recuerdan los viejos tiempos y Brenda tiene un plan para vengarse.

programme.title: La venganza de los ex
programme.desc: Llega el quinto ex a la villa y es una gran sorpresa para varios. Spencer se va de cita y cree encontrar el amor. Rocío muestra que su venganza va en serio y coquetea con Ernesto y Oscar. Una maldición parece romperse en la Master Suite.

programme.title: La venganza de los ex
programme.desc: Hay un nuevo ex y viene dispuesto a reconquistar a su antigua pareja. Renata y Sargento van en serio, mientras que Rocío y Alejandro resuelven sus problemas por un rato. Ernesto sigue tratando de conquistar a Montse.

programme.title: La venganza de los ex
programme.desc: Llega otro ex y causa una revolución en la villa. Ernesto le pide a Montse que sea sincera con él y lo respete. Dianey y Elías se van de cita y le rompen el corazón a Spencer, quien encuentra consuelo muy rápido en Norma.

programme.title: La venganza de los ex VIP
programme.desc: 10 influencers llegan a sus vacaciones en el caribe, pero la "Tablet del Karma" les recuerda que deben saldar cuentas con sus Ex. Asaf elige a Lilian para su corazon.

programme.title: La venganza de los ex VIP
programme.desc: Las advertencias de Valentino se convierten en amenazas. A Alex le regalan un shot, pero en la cara. Llega un nuevo Ex y los celos llenan a la villa de problemas.

programme.title: La venganza de los ex VIP
programme.desc: Valentino celebra el peor cumpleaños por culpa de la Sala Tornado. Desenmascaran a Queen quien saca su furia. Un Ex cae en una venganza tramada. Dos estrenan la Love Suite. Diana y Fershy arruinan la fiesta peleando y alguien debe partir de la villa.

programme.title: La venganza de los ex VIP
programme.desc: Fershy decide quien se va, entre Beni y Alba. La Sala Tornado cocina una venganza que los hará tambalear a todos. Lilian explora con Alba y Bryan mientras que Asaf aprovecha con Valeria. En la nueva habitacion hay sorpresas inesperadas.

programme.title: Súper Shore

programme.title: Súper Shore
programme.desc: Fernando está en crisis, peleado y distanciado de todos, incluso sus amigos de Acapulco Shore. Ya ha tenido cruces con Potro, Abraham, Igor, Mane y Esteban. Mientras tanto Electra y Esteban deberán trabajar juntos en el bar de la playa.

programme.title: Matlock

programme.desc: After a failed attempt to kidnap Matlock’s daughter, the kidnappers take Matlock’s friend instead! Matlock tries to track down his friend, meanwhile, he’s asked to investigate the kidnapping of an eight-year-old boy.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: While Ben is trying to find his friend who was kidnapped, he realizes that an FBI agent is being framed for that crime and more. Now Ben must free the agent from suspicion of murder.

programme.desc: Thanks to Matlock, a struggling private investigator, played by guest star George Peppard, reunites with his long-lost daughter! Together they investigate a mysterious trail of clues to solve the toughest murder case of his career.

programme.desc: Family or not, Matlock regrets agreeing to hold a pre-wedding party for his bride-to-be goddaughter. Fights among the many freeloading guests have left his home in shambles and an old family feud has escalated into murder!

programme.desc: When young attorney Samuel J. Haskins argues his case in court, it's clear he's copying the unusual style of his idol, Ben Matlock. This is flattering until Sam and his girlfriend get tangled up in a blackmail and murder scheme.

programme.title: Matlock

programme.title: Matlock

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: William Shatner guest stars as Joe Conrad, a drug dealer who becomes the unwitting dupe of the Impossible Missions Force in their plan to capture the largest shipment of cocaine ever brought into the country.

programme.desc: Phelps poses as a murderer to infiltrate a gang that specializes in spiriting wanted men out of the country after first brainwashing them to learn the whereabouts of their vast sums of money.

programme.desc: Phelps poses as the head of a Hollywood movie studio as part of the IMF plan to prevent a crime syndicate's takeover of the studio.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: Phelps poses as a government investigator who must work through a crooked district attorney to prove that a crime syndicate boss killed his girlfriend.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: Phelps and Mimi take on the guises of fugitives to invade the home of Jerome Cooper, a nuclear scientist, who is threatening to destroy a major American city with a fifty-megaton hydrogen bomb.

programme.desc: Jim Phelps is kidnapped and held for ransom until Barney, Casey, and Willy can steal an incriminating letter from a safe deposit box and turn it over to crime syndicate boss Andrew Metzger.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: Jim Phelps poses as a master chess champion to trap a criminal with a near genius mentality and his mysterious boss.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: Kim Hunter guest stars as Hannah O'Connel a brilliant but superstitious criminal who escapes to a Caribbean country and is drawn into a voodoo ceremony by the IMF to locate a cache of stolen gold she has hidden away.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: Laraine Stephens guest stars as the beautiful wife of a crime syndicate boss who becomes the target of both the underworld and the Impossible Missions Force when she has her husband killed and steals his records of the syndicate's operations.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible

programme.desc: Mister Rogers hangs a fish mobile, then goes to see some killer whales swim and play. In the Neighborhood of Make-Believe, Lady Elaine teaches dance and says males weren't invited to the studio because they don't dance.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers visits Sam Weber and sees him dance. In the Neighborhood of Make-Believe, King Friday XIII goes to Lady Elaine's dance school, and she turns him away claiming that men can't dance. Sam Weber arrives and dances.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers helps to weave a scarf. Henrietta Pussycat's ballet teacher, Miss Cloud, does not speak but communicates with movement. The Junior Tamburitzans perform two folk dances. Mister Rogers talks about making up stories and dances.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers arrives with a clown mask. "Mayor" Sara prepares a speech as two lost clowns arrive. To help the clowns find their way to the Neighborhood of Make-Believe, Queen Sara suggests that she and Mayor Maggie trade jobs.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Nancy Caterpillar sees herself in a mirror and realizes that she is very special the way she is. She turns into a butterfly. Mister Rogers visits the circus and sees Jeff Gabel apply his clown make-up.

programme.desc: Bob Esponja inventa hamburguesas con colores; Sandy pone a Bob Esponja y a Patricio a cuidar de su oruga.

programme.title: Bob Esponja
programme.desc: Bob Esponja se pregunta si se puede ser grande y todavía besar a su abuela; Calamardo se muda de Fondo de Bikini.

programme.title: Bob Esponja
programme.desc: Bob Esponja se esconde de Sandy; Bob Esponja y Patricio piden prestado un globo de una tienda y accidentalmente lo revientan.

programme.title: Bob Esponja
programme.desc: Bob Esponja y Patricio se cuelan en Treedome; Gary sigue a Patricio por los alrededores y Bob Esponja se pone celoso.

programme.title: Bob Esponja
programme.desc: La Sra. Puff hará cualquier cosa para asegurarse que Bob Esponja pase su examen de manejo y Bob Esponja descubre que su héroe no es tan importante.

programme.title: Bob Esponja
programme.desc: SpongeBob cuenta chistes maliciosos; SpongeBob falla su examen de conducir; SpongeBob cuida el hogar de Mermaid Man y Barnacle Boy.

programme.title: Bob Esponja
programme.desc: Bob Esponja sigue a Arenita en una serie de actividades extremas; luego, Bob Esponja trata de ocultar lo que le hizo a una ostra en el zoológico.

programme.title: Bob Esponja
programme.desc: Bob Esponja va a trabajar para Plankton; Bob Esponja crea un GarabatoEsponja, quien le juega bromas a todo el mundo, obligando a Bob Esponja a borrarlo.

programme.title: Bob Esponja
programme.desc: Bob Esponja no soporta que Patricio no le diga qué hay dentro de la caja; Calamardo, Bob Esponja y la pandilla forman su propia banda de música.

programme.title: Bob Esponja

programme.title: Bob Esponja
programme.desc: Bob Esponja intenta escribir un ensayo de 800 palabras antes del amanecer; Patrick trata de impresionar a sus padres en el día de las estrellas de mar.

programme.title: Bob Esponja
programme.desc: Bob Esponja lee una palabra soez y no sabe lo que significa, pero la repite. Bob Esponja se inscribe en una clase de arte que imparte Calamardo, pero él es un profesor arrogante y quiere seguir las explicaciones del libro al pie de la letra.

programme.title: Bob Esponja
programme.desc: Pat consigue un trabajo en el Chum Bucket y compite con Bob Esponja en los juegos Fry Cook; Bob Esponja lleva una manada de medusas al Sr. Cangrejo.

programme.title: Bob Esponja
programme.desc: Como Don Cangrejo es injusto con sus empleados, Bob Esponja y Calamardo deciden hacer una huelga. Una lombriz aterroriza Fondo de Bikini.

programme.title: Bob Esponja
programme.desc: Bob Esponja se ofrece como salvavidas. Además, Plankton inventa una máquina que le permite cambiar de vida con don Cangrejo.

programme.title: Bob Esponja
programme.desc: Calamardo no está permitido en la casa del árbol de Bob Esponja y Patricio; luego, Bob Esponja adopta un caballito de mar, y se lo lleva por todas partes.

programme.title: Bob Esponja
programme.desc: Bob Esponja descubre que Calamardo nunca ha probado una Krabby Patty; y luego, Bob Esponja es preocupado por un nuevo alumno en la escuela de canotaje.

programme.title: Bob Esponja

programme.title: Bob Esponja

programme.title: Bob Esponja

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: As the contenders for the battle of Block D dwindle to only thirty, Rebecca has her hands full with the menacing Suleiman the Beheader! All hope seems lost that she can take him down and move on to the finals!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The battle for Block D comes to a shocking end and the winner that emerges from the cloud of dust stuns the audience even more! Meanwhile, Luffy, Zoro, Kin'emon, and Wicka of the Tontatta Tribe are about to reach the lift to the palace.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Viola, aka Violet, once a great princess of the Dressrosa family, shows Luffy & the others a secret entrance into the palace which avoids the use of the heavily-guarded lift. In the palace's Suit Chamber, Navy Admiral Fujitora reveals his plans.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The final round at the Corrida Colosseum finally begins, as Diamante joins the combatants in an all-out struggle to win the Flare-Flare Fruit! As the stakes escalate, can one champion beat the others & snatch the fruit from the Colosseum's newest hazard?

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy and his group continue their ascent towards Doflamingo's inner sanctum, but standing in their way is an executive of the family whose power is so strong moving past him seems impossible! Meanwhile, Cavendish learns the dark secrets of Dressrosa.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: As Operation SOP finally gets underway but as Leo makes the dash to hide the Tatabasco grape in Sugar's fruit basket, Robin calls for an emergency stop to the plan! Meanwhile, Luffy, Violet, and Zoro are stalled by Pica whose sheer size overwhelms them.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Operation SOP is underway and nearing its final stage! But Trebol proves a far stronger guard for Sugar than was expected, so Robin hatches a plan to lure him away. But is there enough time to execute the plan before the ruse is discovered?

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Tontattas are devastated by Trebol's furious attack, but as Usopp tries to convince Leo to abort the operation, Leo tells him about their commander Toy Soldier's stunning true identity! The Toy Soldier finally shakes off Lao G and gets moving again!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Zoro continues his deadly duel with the nearly indestructible Pica! While the Toy Soldier narrowly escapes Lao G only to come face to face with Gladius! Luffy continues his mad dash to the top of the palace to face Doflamingo!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: With the Tontattas beaten, Robin turned into a toy, and Luffy, Franky, and the others busy elsewhere, Usopp is the last hope for Operation SOP! But will he be able to muster the confidence and courage to face the terrible Trebol?

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Usopp runs into trouble in his battle with Treebol, and flashback sheds light on how a young Kyros made the shocking transition from murderer to one of King Riku's most trusted men.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: In the Royal Palace, Viola, Luffy, and the Toy Soldier have hidden themselves outside Doflamingo's chamber, only to have more enemies approach from behind, leaving them surrounded! Meanwhile, Franky is knocked out cold by the Navy.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Toys all across Dressrosa regain their human form, a flood of forgotten memories return, and Kyros launches a long overdue attack on the villainous tyrant Doflamingo!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Kyros finally taking down Doflamingo leaves Doflamingo's clan shocked! Meanwhile at the Colosseum, Rebecca gets her memories of her loving father Kyros back, and Sabo makes a move to end the championship battle by blowing up the whole ring!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy hurries to free Law, but with their pirate alliance dissolved, will Law still see Luffy as an ally? Meanwhile, Usopp has convinced his newfound followers to destroy the factory! Doflamingo's defeat has thrown Dressrosa into chaos.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The mystery of Doflamingo's return from the dead is revealed! But there isn't much time to ponder how it happened, as his plan to silence the country of Dressrosa unfolds, spelling doom for the Straw Hats!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: As the people of Dressrosa see their friends and loved ones slaughter each other under the manipulation of Doflamingo, memories of 10 years ago rush back, and the truth of that event becomes clear. Doflamingo announces the rules for his deadly game.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Doflamingo and Fujitora's agreement to not engage each other lasts for the moment - meaning all eyes are turned towards taking down the Straw Hats and claiming the rewards! And as Luffy starts heading to the Royal Palace, Fujitora stands in his way!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Robin, Usopp, the Tontattas and the others make moves to rejoin Luffy as Doflamingo's deadly game rages on! Meanwhile, Kin'emon makes it to the trash heap in his search for his friend Kanjuro - just as Pica emerges in the town.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: With Luffy & the others recovering from Pica's attack, the game is afoot! Luffy has just enough time to regroup and set out to find Doflamingo, only to find that the dastardly Warlord has more enemies than he might realize! A strange argument breaks out.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Don Chin Jao and Elizabello successfully break Pica's giant arm but the rock giant is unfazed and starts throwing even more destructive punches at Luffy and his band of unwanted collaborators! Meanwhile, Navy Admiral Fujitora moves into action.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy and Moocy fast approach the showdown with Doflamingo - while the others with a beef against him continue to tag along. Meanwhile, Violet finds the key to Law's handcuffs, and Rebecca pledges to deliver it to him.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy makes headway toward Doflamingo's refuge, making his way through Doflamingo's guards, while down below Admiral Fujitora faces off against Sabo, who has the power of the Fire Fist from eating the Flare-Flare Fruit!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy cuts a lucky break as Kelly Funk shows him a shortcut to the Palace! But all may not be as it seems... Meanwhile, Franky and Zoro are locked in one-on-one duels, while Robin, Rebecca, and Bartolomeo enlist the help of the Tontattas.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Penned in at the bottom of a well, Luffy and Law are caught in a trap! But someone has come to save them who they least expect! Meanwhile, the Tontattas help Franky break in to the SMILE factory, and Bartolomeo resorts to tactics he used in the Colosseum.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Tontattas locate their captive comrades and seem to be able to get the message to them - the prison break is on! Meanwhile, heavy-hitters from the Colosseum turn from wringing each other's necks towards a unified plan.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Hidden far underground, Kin'emon finds his old friend Kanjuro whose powers allow the two to, quickly, but not elegantly, escape to the surface! Meanwhile, Cavendish shares his fears that the "Birdcage" game Doflamingo is playing has been rigged all along.

programme.title: The Dead Zone: Outcome
programme.desc: Johnny has to race against the clock to prevent a massive explosion from ripping apart the regional bus station.

programme.title: The Dead Zone: Transgressions
programme.desc: Faith and truth collide as Johnny is thrust into a murder investigation of a young missing woman.

programme.title: Ash vs Evil Dead
programme.desc: Ash is baaack! 30 years after his last Deadite fight, badass blowhard Ash Williams unleashes the Evil in an act of stoned stupidity, bringing Deadite mayhem into his life again.

programme.title: Ash vs Evil Dead
programme.desc: Special Agent Fisher is tracking Ash. Pablo gets his first taste of blood in a manic battle, and a revelation changes Kelly's life forever.

programme.title: Ash vs Evil Dead
programme.desc: Ash, Pablo and Kelly reach Books from Beyond with the Necronomicon and Fisher finds herself in another terrifying, inexplicable situation.

programme.title: Ash vs Evil Dead
programme.desc: Ruby helps Fisher and reveals her family's connection to the Evil Dead. Ash and team follow a clue from the demon Eligos, but Kelly pays a price.

programme.title: Ash vs Evil Dead
programme.desc: Kelly's current state puts others in jeopardy. This forces Pablo to make a brave move and Ash to reveal a new side to his character. Ruby and Fisher join forces in pursuit of Ash.

programme.title: Sanctuary
programme.desc: When a mating pair of cute, furry, and seemingly harmless abnormals is brought in for scientific study, the Sanctuary team begins to exhibit some hidden animal attractions for one another.

programme.title: Sanctuary
programme.desc: While leading a covert meeting in Rome, Magnus (AMANDA TAPPING) encounters Nikola Tesla (JONATHAN YOUNG), an old friend from her past who confides that the Cabal has come to exact revenge on her for the events in "Fata Morgana".

programme.title: Sanctuary
programme.desc: A young artist with an uncanny ability to draw remarkably detailed pictures from memory may be the key to solving a case surrounding the suspicious death of his abusive father.

programme.title: Sanctuary
programme.desc: Magnus (AMANDA TAPPING) and Will (ROBIN DUNNE) investigate a distressing call for help deep below the Bermuda Triangle resulting in a deadly battle to save Magnus's life.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict
programme.desc: A high school student becomes a hybrid pawn for the Atavus after starting an Atavus Fan Club web site.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict
programme.desc: A hybrid-infested hospital uses comatose patients as a food source for the Atavus.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict
programme.desc: Juda's (Guylaine St. Onge) death spells hope for Renee (Jayne Heitmeyer) in her battle against the Atavus.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict
programme.desc: Renee (Jayne Heitmeyer) and a rogue archeologist (Juan Chioran) search the Pyramids for a tomb that may contain an ancient Atavus.

programme.title: The Disappearance of Susan Cox Powell
programme.desc: A young mother in Utah vanishes and the only suspect, her husband, acts suspiciously; Stephanie Bauer examines never-before-seen home video recordings that shed light on the dramatic events surrounding the disappearance of Susan Cox Powell.

programme.title: Criminal Confessions
programme.desc: When young woman's body is found burning in the woods, investigators are left with many questions; they follow a trail of fire, fury, and falsities to get to the truth.

programme.title: Criminal Confessions
programme.desc: When Kim Allen is found murdered in her home, her estranged and abusive husband is the likely suspect; risky bluff by detectives takes the case in a surprising direction.

programme.title: Criminal Confessions
programme.desc: In 1981, a mother vanishes from the Hernando woods and the case goes cold and 33 years later, local detectives take the baton from Kelly and the Cold Justice team only to discover that getting a confession may be the only way to solve the case.

programme.title: Criminal Confessions
programme.desc: A mother of two disappears after a night out at a local bar in New Mexico; investigators race the clock in the hopes of finding her alive, and are eventually stunned by what they uncover.

programme.title: Criminal Confessions
programme.desc: A shooting in broad daylight in the city of Waterloo, Iowa leaves two dead; investigators Camarata and Moller follow a trail of bloody footprints to a list of suspects and an unexpected lead from a knowledgeable confidential informant.

programme.title: Criminal Confessions
programme.desc: Women are found brutally murdered and panic strikes Baton Rouge; the city suspects a serial killer is on the loose; in an example of police work at its finest, detectives lead investigators to an unlikely suspect hiding a dark secret.

programme.title: Criminal Confessions
programme.desc: When a hardworking single mother with a history of heart issues is found dead on the front steps of her home, detectives assume she died of natural causes, but as the investigation progresses, it becomes clear foul play was involved.

programme.title: Criminal Confessions
programme.desc: In Florida, a devoted mother disappears into the night after tucking her daughter into bed; investigators chase down a trail of leads that include multiple suspects, culminating in a horrifying discovery.

programme.title: Criminal Confessions
programme.desc: A mother's only hope of finding her missing 20-year-old daughter rests in the hands of a seasoned investigator from the DA's office, who takes on her case after it's been cold for seven years.

programme.title: Criminal Confessions
programme.desc: After a college freshman goes missing without a trace, concerned friends and family talk to police about his last whereabouts; those conversations, however, raise more questions than answers when they point to a potentially deadly love triangle.

programme.title: Criminal Confessions
programme.desc: A wife returns home to find her husband shot dead, and detectives search for the truth for two years.

programme.title: American Pickers

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: In an antique shop closed since the 70s, Mike and Frank go toe-to-toe with the sibling owners who negotiate for every last dollar.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: Mike and Frank stumble upon a potential mega-pick in Northeast Iowa, but will it yield any treasures? Danielle has a lead on a rare, 15-gallon antique gas pump.

programme.title: American Pickers

programme.title: Pawn Stars

programme.title: Pawn Stars

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: The Pawn Stars reach for the sky when a man walks in with a custom set of 19th century double barrel firearms.

programme.title: Pawn Stars

programme.title: Pawn Stars

programme.desc: A famous canon rolls into the shop, and an old friend causes some Cajun confusion trying to pawn an old family gumbo recipe.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: Danielle has asked for a raise, but Mike and Frank delay a decision until they see how successful they are with the next trip she sends them on--through Kentucky.

programme.title: American Pickers
